title: 30 Day Coloring Challenge Blog Hop
excerpt: Hello! If you're new around here, and coming from Kristina Werner's blog , welcome! Let me first admit that I am horrible at keeping up with a lengthy challenge - even if it's just for 21 days. For some reason…
body:
Hello! If you're new around here, and coming from Kristina Werner's blog, welcome! Let me first admit that I am horrible at keeping up with a lengthy challenge - even if it's just for 21 days. For some reason I am all about whatever it is for the first few days, sometimes even making it a week, but then I totally lose steam. Not sure if it's a focus issue or a motivation problem, but I make excuses and don't continue for various reasons. But this one, my friends, I am going to do! I am going to stick with it and make this one happen. I may need your help and encouragement, but I think this is going to be a good one. My friend Kathy asked me to be a part of her 5th installment of her coloring challenge called, "The Daily Marker 30 Day". It's my first time participating and it seems like a super fun challenge and a great way to get full use of your supplies. 

Basically the goal is to color something daily even if it's a few minutes. It's not required, no one will be watching over you, but it can be fun to try and participate in if you're game. It's meant to be fun and no stress. I am going to attempt to do it for the whole 30 days - how hard could it be to carve out 5 minutes?! Plus I have already started and am loving the way it's making me feel. I'll be sharing some of work as well, and if you care to share, you can use #TheDailyMarker30Day. Here's the video I created:

Would love if you subscribed to my YouTube channel as I just hit 30,000 subscribers! And if you're following along on Instagram, we just hit 75,000! Wow + THANK YOU! 

Be sure to leave a comment at each of the blogs participating in this hop for your chance to win a free class of your choice from OnlineCardClasses.com. There will be a winner chosen at each stop - and the contest closes on July 12, at 12am ET.

Jennifer McGuire’s blog JENNIFER MCGUIRE INK

Kristina Werner’s blog KWERNERDESIGN

Amy Tangerine's blog AMY TANGERINE  YOU ARE HERE!

Debby Hughes’s blog LIME DOODLE DESIGN

Dawn at WPLUS9 BLOG

Kathy Racoosin’s blog THE DAILY MARKER

The six winners will be announced on Kathy's Blog on Wednesday, July 13. And check out the next stop on the hop, Debby of Lime Doodle Design!
